title: Piglin Bartering for JEI
description: Adds Piglin bartering trades to JEI for convenient in-game reference.
body:
# Piglin Bartering for JEI adds all Piglin bartering trades directly into JEI.

You can view every possible bartering outcome in-game without relying on external wikis.

The mod is lightweight and designed to integrate cleanly into survival gameplay and modpacks.

Requirements:
- Minecraft (see supported versions in the Files tab)
- Forge
- Just Enough Items (JEI)

Compatibility:
Compatibility with large modpacks may vary.

_Feedback and bug reports are welcome._
